action: Schedule actions 1–7 every 2 hours, track a single news story per genre until closure, and maintain an array with all relevant metadata and timestamps for each story cycle.

recipe.steps: Create a scheduled task to execute actions 1-7 in sequence automatically.
Track a single news story for each genre from start to closure, updating its status and saving the relevant metadata at each step using the internal database or memory tool.

For each news cycle, maintain and update an array that captures: genre, conv_id, assigned avatar ID, video URL, video status, generation timestamp, expiry timestamp, and all relevant story update timestamps for lifecycle tracking.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Automatically execute the full workflow for news video creation, tracking, and metadata storage for each genre.
